title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama 是一个开源项目，旨在让用户轻松运行 Kimi-K2.6、GLM-5.2、MiniMax、DeepSeek、gpt-oss、Qwen、Gemma 等多种大型语言模型。该项目使用 Go 语言开发，拥有超过 17.6 万星标，支持包括 deepseek、gemma、llama 等在内的多种模型。它简化了本地部署和运行 LLM 的流程，是 AI 社区中广泛使用的工具。
summary_en: Ollama is an open-source project designed to easily run various large language models including Kimi-K2.6, GLM-5.2, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma, and others. Developed in Go, it has over 176k stars and supports models like deepseek, gemma, and llama. It simplifies local deployment and execution of LLMs, making it a widely used tool in the AI community.
